# Button

The primary button component for triggering actions and events. Supports multiple visual variants, sizes, color palettes, and loading states.

## Import

```jsx
import { Button } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `"solid" \| "subtle" \| "surface" \| "outline" \| "ghost" \| "plain"` | `"solid"` | The visual style variant |
| `size` | `"2xs" \| "xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg" \| "xl" \| "2xl"` | `"md"` | The size of the button |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"primary"` | The color palette (e.g., `"primary"`, `"secondary"`, `"red"`, `"green"`, `"blue"`) |
| `loading` | `boolean` | `false` | Shows a loading spinner and disables the button |
| `loadingText` | `string` | - | Text to display alongside the spinner when loading |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Disables the button |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | - | The button content |
| `onClick` | `function` | - | Click event handler |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Button>Click Me</Button>
```

### Variants

```jsx
<Button variant="solid">Solid</Button>
<Button variant="subtle">Subtle</Button>
<Button variant="surface">Surface</Button>
<Button variant="outline">Outline</Button>
<Button variant="ghost">Ghost</Button>
<Button variant="plain">Plain</Button>
```

### Sizes

```jsx
<Button size="2xs">Tiny</Button>
<Button size="xs">Extra Small</Button>
<Button size="sm">Small</Button>
<Button size="md">Medium</Button>
<Button size="lg">Large</Button>
<Button size="xl">Extra Large</Button>
<Button size="2xl">Huge</Button>
```

### Color palettes

```jsx
<Button colorPalette="primary">Primary</Button>
<Button colorPalette="secondary">Secondary</Button>
<Button colorPalette="red">Danger</Button>
<Button colorPalette="green">Success</Button>
```

### Loading state

```jsx
<Button loading>Saving</Button>
<Button loading loadingText="Submitting...">Submit</Button>
```

### Disabled

```jsx
<Button disabled>Unavailable</Button>
```

### With icons

```jsx
<Button>
  <LuPlus /> Add Item
</Button>

<Button variant="outline">
  Download <LuDownload />
</Button>
```

## Features

- Defaults to `colorPalette="primary"` for consistent branding
- 6 visual variants for different emphasis levels
- 7 size options from `2xs` to `2xl`
- Built-in loading state with optional loading text
- Supports color palettes for semantic coloring
- Supports all Chakra UI style props for custom styling
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
